<?php /** * sect131r1 * * PHP version 5 and 7 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2017 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://pear.php.net/package/Math_BigInteger */ namespace phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\Curves; use phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\BaseCurves\Binary; use phpseclib3\Math\BigInteger; class sect131r1 extends Binary { public function __construct() { $this->setModulo(131, 8, 3, 2, 0); $this->setCoefficients( '07A11B09A76B562144418FF3FF8C2570B8', '0217C05610884B63B9C6C7291678F9D341' ); $this->setBasePoint( '0081BAF91FDF9833C40F9C181343638399', '078C6E7EA38C001F73C8134B1B4EF9E150' ); $this->setOrder(new BigInteger('0400000000000000023123953A9464B54D', 16)); } }
